title: Skepticism
description: A minecraft resource pack in development. Custom sounds, custom UI's, item textures. All designed for pvp and general use. A vanilla overhaul texturepack.
body:
A minecraft resource pack in development. Custom sounds, custom UI's, item textures. All designed for pvp and general use. A vanilla overhaul texturepack.

The pack adds:
- Better stone textures and wood plank types
- New clean transparent GUI
- New block outlines and hitboxes
- Small swords and reskinned tools for all ore types
- A few new custom sounds that I find more satisfying than vanilla.

View the gallery for more!!
